final:
module RefModule(
    input wire T,
    input wire EN,
    input wire clk,
    output reg Q
);
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (EN) begin
            if (T)
                Q <= ~Q; // Toggle the output
        end
    end
endmodule
